description: Article Number: 6062SL02Case style: Analogue watch, has a stylised rectangular case, has a stainless steel back Dial style: Black dial with steel toned and white hands, branding on the four hour mark Strap style: Black leather strap, secured with a tang clasp Screw to reset time Water resistance up to 30 mComes in a signature Fastrack boxWarranty: 2 years on mechanism only and 1 year on battery (manufacturing defects only)
